summary: 0.6.60 is a narrow recovery slice: keep periodic AV sync at the existing one-second cadence, tighten the drift threshold so small offsets can be corrected, arm the first post-seek check immediately, and fix the demo3 shuffle checkbox so it can toggle random playback off as well as on.
operatorSignals: 0.6.59 was better overall and image behavior was good, but a tiny 100-200ms audio/video drift was still noticeable.
The operator wanted sync to stay on a one-second cadence and not widen into more loops.
The demo3 shuffle checkbox could enable random playback but not reliably disable it again, even though plugin-side random control worked.
actionsTaken: Kept the existing one-second periodic AV sync cadence.
Lowered the periodic AV correction threshold from 0.20 seconds to 0.05 seconds.
Changed the VideoPlayer seek-completed hook to arm the next periodic sync check immediately.
Added an attached-player Player Random Toggle action and rewired the demo3 shuffle checkbox to fire it on transition.
nonGoals: No image scrub transport changes in this slice.
No movie joystick transport changes in this slice.
No slideshow, right-stick volume, or deferred gaze work in this slice.
